creator: bapt@FreeBSD.org
text:
The package expects a hardlink for any reason, and you have partitionned your system to both ends of the hardlinks are on different filesystems, meaning we cannot hardlink.

There is nothing pkg can do about this. The only possible solution would be that the package uses a symlink instead of a hardlink. But there might be reason why librenms is using hardlinks (maybe not :))

So imho not a problem of the package itself neither on the pkg side.
Maybe an upstream problem.
